v33=getrawmetatable(game)local v34=v33[v154("Y\230h\181\158\162\2446\149\211","\191\006\185\006\212\243\199\151W\249")]setreadonly(v33,false)v33[v154("\221\239\233h\244=8uC\176","\018\130\176\135\t\153X[\020/\220\215\173\227O")]=newcclosure(function(...)local v0=getnamecallmethod()local v1={...}if tostring(v0)==v154("?L\vY\128\239\186)=\208","\190y%y<\211\138\200_X\162\238")then if tostring(v1[1])==v154("G2\174.\140\201=\227#\146\162","\224\021W\195A\248\172x\149F\252\214\243e")then if tostring(v1[2])~=v154("\vK>A","b\1279K$\169(bTO<q\151\004b")and v34(...)end)GetConnectionEnemies=function(v0)for v1,v2 in pairs(replicated:GetChildren())do if v2:IsA(v154("\195t\000\203\250","\244\142\027d\174\150\243\223"))and((typeof(v0)==v154("[.\031\187\236","Q/O}\215\137C*")and next,game[v154("k\231\221r\201\029a{+","N<\136\175\025\186m\000\024")][v154("\016ev\152\224\143l","\146U\v\019\245\137\234\031\158tevP\022")]:GetChildren()do if v2:IsA(v154("\183\00099\n","\\\250o]\\f\030\163\a9"))and((typeof(v0)==v154("k\197Q\143\139","}\031\1643\227\238\146")and v2[v154("u\v\015\160\2343\132\160","\196=~b\193\132\\\237")][v154("P\027\004\148Ad","\147\024~e\2485\012\158\188D\'\030\129\193\025")]>0))then return v2 end end end LowCpu=function()local v0=true \150\214\193}#\028;\173\193","\024MhT\223\184\183")))do if type(v2)==v154("\213\029\128\214u","P\161|\226\186\016\b\211f2\132")then if v2[v154("e\132H`","y+\229%\005\185&\209<(\028\180\183\1323\223")]==v0 or plr[v154("\146\240\"\243\163\195(j\133","\247\209\152C\129\194\160\\\015")]:FindFirstChild(v0)or plr[v154("\'i\204\220\181\005\2136","]e\b\175\183\197d\182")]:FindFirstChild(v0)then return true end end end return false end GetM=function(v0)for v1,v2 in pairs(replicated[v154("\176\018\150\162Kx\147","\224\226w\251\205?\029")][v154("p\243\173\170F#","E3\156\192\199\000|")]:InvokeServer(v154("\019\237c\249\178r\158$\245\142\217\228","\026t\136\023\176\220\004\251J\129\225\171\157\248Yr")))do if type(v2)==v154("6Sx\254\209","\244B2\026\146\180\'\133\016\132\152j\205\237\198")then if v2[v154("\184\'\031O","\163\236^o*\219pl~\168\223\1711\135")]==v154("\182\148\251w\251\021x\137","\229\251\245\143\018\137|\025")then if v2[v154("\147\028\158\154","\130\221}\243\255\214\192J\234?]")]==v0 then return v2[v154(")\aF\187\174","\203jh3\213\218\191\174~\250\214j\146\174\253")]end end end end return 0 end GetWP=function(v0)for v1,v2 in pairs(replicated[v154("\212\141\245\245\184h\250","e\134\232\152\154\204\r\137\139\158\021\"")][v154("\156\177\"\249\250\230","\185\223\222O\148\188")]:InvokeServer(v154("r\012\210\023\152\129j<a\006\212\'","R\021i\166^\246\247\015")))do if type(v2)==v154("I^\136\031\144",";=?\234s\245\164\169")then if v2[v154("k\137\221\139","A?\240\173\238\031")]==v154("\157\024bXo","\235\206o\r*\v\004R\218\176\180")then if v2[v154("EEA!","\254\v$,D\023")]==v0 or plr[v154("TO)\157\223\166\210\023]","/\023\'H\239\190\197\166r")]:FindFirstChild(v0)or plr[v154("\178aHb\022q\218S","\022\240\000+\tf\016\1858R")]:FindFirstChild(v0)then return true end end end end return false end getInfinity_Ability=function(v0,v1)if not Root then return end if v0==v154("\173XD\t","\158\25476|\020\206+\191B\146\177#")and v1 then for v0,v2 in next,getgc()do if plr[v154("\014\246\227,\136\223+\004\217","pM\158\130^\233\188_a\171\207\025\159\134")][v154("\136/\216\248","\a\219@\170\141\213\246\217\249D")]then if typeof(v2)==v154("\226\224\250\195WwX\001","\137\132\149\148\160#\0307o\147\tEa\012\189\164")and(getfenv(v2))[v154("\015\162W;.>","\255|\193%R^J6z\239\216~\181\169")]==plr[v154("\217\196\252\003\026VNg\231","\174\154\172\157q{5:\002\149w\027\247")][v154("\146\213\146p","h\193\186\224\005\187\149Rm<\a")]then for v0,v2 in next,getupvalues(v2)do if typeof(v2)==v154("_\252\168\200f","\030+\157\202\164\003k\020\"")then repeat wait(Sec)v2[v154("\2547\132\244\1702\189","7\178V\247\128\255A\216w\184\137?")]=0 until not v1 or plr[v154("\021\188\159\000\136\216\148yV",".V\212\254r\233\187\224\028$\240D\ry")][v154("lJO\161p\144\174_"," $?\"\192\030\255\199;1")][v154("\230\154,\152\025\151","o\174\255M\244m\255\242\212\025\vk\218?\237=")]<=0 end end end end end elseif v0==v154("\238] iuz","i\1713E\027\018\003\141p^")and v1 then plr[v154("M\005J\204\154\187\210nQ","\154\014m+\190\251\216\166\v#I")][v154("\246\b\235\188\182\003",";\179f\142\206\209z\247")][v154("CC\229{{\189\208","\222\000+\132\021\028\216\180\254q \1794fl")]:connect(function()if v1 then plr[v154("\224\216\001?0\243\002\028o","\"\163\176`MQ\144vy\029\226\211\150M\188s")][v154("r2\129-\219\'","\2187\\\228_\188^")][v154("4\130jX\160","nb\227\006-\1974\023\027\001\206\030\133\180")]=Energy end end)elseif v0==v154("a\242\163\185\170\a\252p\188\029\030","p.\144\208\220\216q\157\004\213r")and v1 then local v0=plr[v154("\241=\214\192b\016S\247\026y\225\189","\206\167T\165\169\r~\001\150~\016\148")]v0[v154("\166\243B\001\006","c\240\146.tc~\128\030x\003\142")]=math[v154("\196\210\253\176","\184\172\167\154\213\b\230\181")]end end Hop=function()pcall(function()for v0=math[v154("\142\235\169q\234M","\175\252\138\199\021\133 \253\242/")](1,math[v154("\192\242\127\210tD","\244\178\147\017\182\027)&")](40,75)),100,1 do local v1=replicated[v154("e\005\217K\1944\220\173-\215\207\166\179tH","\017:Z\138.\176B\185\223o\165\160\209\192")]:InvokeServer(v0)for v0,v1 in next,v1 do if tonumber(v1[v154("\135<\223\152W","\174\196S\170\246#")])<12 then TeleportService:TeleportToPlaceInstance(game[v154("\020\167\002^\246\rZ","\004D\203c=\147D>`\165\229")],v0)end end end end)end local v35=Instance[v154("\131\233y","\020\237\140\014\170\169\133\028(\153\139\bX\005")](v154("\215q\185\a","B\135\016\203s\194-\195\203\245\002=\180\233\224"),workspace)v35[v154("v\183\171\182","\159%\222\209\211\207{")]=Vector3[v154("|>Y","\246\018[.\252@~m\t;\253\132")](1,1,1)v35[v154("\235(\234\240","\005\165I\135\1491\211s\190]\252H\222")]=v154("\151\211)\0257\202\136%/","\154\197\186YF~\164\236WN\191P")v35[v154("\141TK\142\244\244@\196","\"\204:(\230\155\134%\160\204%\018\029H")]=true v35[v154("#\185Nr\025k\n\189a\005","\005`\216 1v\af\212")]=false v35[v154("V\168\164?iq\r;","\248\021\201\202k\006\004nSL")]=false v35[v154("]*\222\236*\2131-\022Gg\211","\185\tX\191\130Y\165P_s)\004\170\192\248L")]=1 local v36=workspace:FindFirstChild(v35[v154("\203\189\183\t","\232\133\220\218lO\250")])if v36 and v36~=v35 then v36:Destroy()end task[v154("X\236\146\251|","\155+\156\243\140\018\144\025N")](function()while task[v154("\172\196\n\209","\188\219\165c\165R\019\138U+\130\190")]()do if v35 and v35[v154("z\248\214\219\146x","F*\153\164\190\252\012")]==workspace then if shouldTween then(getgenv())[v154("F\255\249D\211\n","\169\t\145\191%\161gd\223\222\205\149;\180\024")]=true end)task[v154("\184\156^\000v","_\203\236?w\024")](function()local v0=game[v154("\223%N\174\210\253#","\188\143I/\215\183\143P\184c@")][v154("\159\159c\250GY\027\144\207\143\135","S\211\240\000\155+\tw\241\182\234\245\165")]repeat task[v154("J\017\206\027","\205=p\167o\184\235\217[\211\200")]()until v0[v154("\174>\149#q\bm&\233",";\237V\244Q\016k\025C\155\162\191\241\196\r\012")]and v0[v154("\252\224\025K\141\205\157\222\247","\237\191\136x9\236\174\233\187\133")][v154("K\228\230zH\134J\129\199R?","\020\027\150\143\023)\2443\209\166 +\175\178")]while task[v154("l\024v\030","\020\027y\031j\"\219Z\238\226")]()do pcall(function()if(getgenv())[v154("\228\199g\000\181\185","\134\171\169!a\199\212")]then if v35 and v35[v154("e\134\210\194\206\218","M5\231\160\167\160\174\255`\173.\183\167")]==workspace then local v1=v0[v154("\178\229\212\188,\133\012`|","\024\241\141\181\206M\230x\005\014E\"\025p`\023")]and v0[v154("Gz%\158?\132,\140\225","6\004\018D\236^\231X\233\147\r\155\219\199")][v154(">\194\168*\248\181\195\b\192\028\196","\161n\176\193G\153\199\186X")]if v1 and(v1[v154("\014\225.\219(\247(\202","|^\142]\178\\\158G\164\194u\1284(@")]-v35[v154("\178\188\240\234qYt\144","\173\226\211\131\131\0050\027\254\142QG\127\031\143")])[v154("\225\215\187\190\172\220T?\184","S\172\182\220\208\197\168![\221")]<=200 then v1[v154("\1814\131\207\192\025","\243\246r\241\174\173|\149\192F\247\219vD")]=v35[v154("\254\247\014\030K\251",".\189\177|\127&\158K\214\222\176<g\023")]else v35[v154("Ib\252\233m\171","\186\n$\142\136\000\206\028Im;\169\182\023\252")]=v1[v154("\249nY\236^\168","\152\186(+\1413\205\029\174\187\029R\198C")]end end local v1=v0[v154("\t4\188\224tb>9\175","\001J\\\221\146\021")]if v1 then for v0,v1 in pairs(v1:GetChildren())do if v1:IsA(v154("\153X\172\019J\140\019.","\210\2199\223v\026\237aZ9\016"))then v1[v154("\209\001\a\135\217\157\253\222Q\247","5\146`i\196\182\241\145\183")]=false end end end else local v1=v0[v154("4G\184\168_\231\252\'\231","#w/\217\218>\132\136B\149\161\246q\232)\127")]if v1 then for v0,v1 in pairs(v1:GetChildren())do if v1:IsA(v154("\030OZV\200X.Z","9\\.)3\152"))then v1[v154("\006\186\016\155\171<>\029\179\255","\215E\219~\216\196PRt\215\154\024\015")]=true end end end end end)end end)_tp=function(v0)local v1=plr[v154("\145\214\239\183\019\230\026\163\168","\218\210\190\142\197r\133n\198")]if not v1 or not v1:FindFirstChild(v154("[\015N\204\026\145\203\136A\021L\217$\159\208\152","\236\019z#\173t\254\162"))then return end local v2=v1[v154("S\150\015\020\a\187%\2214t\140\022%\b\1668","f\027\227bui\212L\185")]local v3=(v0[v154("{\129\"\182\152\231\156\207","\204+\238Q\223\236\142\243\161*\030\196\239\170\197")]-v2[v154("\219\2250\175\180\031\1468","\149\139\142C\198\192v\253V\205")])[v154("\151\239\205R\234\203\218\239\172","\201\218\142\170<\131\191\175\139")]local v4=TweenInfo[v154("\128\145`","\229\238\244\023\216\200i\235H&\'\228")](v3/300,Enum[v154("\225\209\188\243\146zP\208\201\163\255","\003\164\176\207\154\252\029")][v154("\163\004\165q\208*","x\239m\203\020\177XPrgf\208")])local v5=(game:GetService(v154("\023\241X\230]\168\253\250t\236\138\201","\172C\134=\1313\251\152\136\002\133\233\172\193.\154"))):Create(v35,v4,{[v154("\146\129#>[\242","\234\209\199Q_6\151\137B")]=v0})if plr[v154("\213\130\187\234z%\167\236\t","\146\150\234\218\152\027F\211\137{\v\230*\005\138\182")][v154("5U\003h\020\254\162\025","\203} n\tz\145")][v154("%\148\163","Xv\253\215\251Qc\212\204")]==true then v35[v154("ec\169\145h\225","\023&%\219\240\005\132\211\200T\0172\254")]=CFrame[v154("$\163K","\147J\198<\141\'%\166\015(\164\153D\168\205V")](v35[v154("\130\241\232\171l\148\127u","Q\210\158\155\194\024\253\016\027\208l\170\192\002\253")][v154("`","I8\154\031\172C=Qqk")],v0[v154("\191","\167\230\189\016h\218\212f\244E,\237\004-6g")],v35[v154("\132\005\186\207\134\135\229\021","{\212j\201\166\242\238\138")][v154("\218","\240\128~i\210B\164L\154.")])end v5:Play()task[v154("\211\016rk|","\188\160`\019\028\018v\219\221k\206*~\142a")](function()while v5[v154("\251E\139\136\001\220_\246\022\223H\158\148","E\171)\234\241c\189<\157")]==Enum[v154("n\030\169%gw\208f\028\196_|\138","Q>r\200\\\005\022\179\rO\176>\b\239")][v154("\155\223z\239\147\195p","(\203\179\027\150\250\173\023<7")]do if not shouldTween then v5:Cancel()break end task[v154("3\210v\152","\197D\179\031\236\209\140\219\197\021\176(\147l")](.1)end end)end TeleportToTarget=function(v0)if(v0[v154("\014>\t\236o\248\192\201","<^Qz\133\027\145\175\167\244\b%\027\015")]-plr[v154("\195t\019YY\000ZL\151","\229\128\028r+8c.)")][v154("m\003t\231;\255\202\169\243\164\aQ&x\244!","h%v\025\134U\144\163\205\161\203")][v154("\024\222\144%r\207m\179","oH\177\227L\006\166\002\221\237[V\134\173\2075")])[v154("J\n\222-a(\0122\143","\154\ak\185C\b\\yV\234\232\249")]>1000 then _tp(v0)else _tp(v0)end end notween=function(v0)plr[v154("\135%g\161\r\020i\148\188","7\196M\006\211lw\029\241\206")][v154("\205\024,\244dp\014\225?.\250~O\006\247\025","g\133mA\149\n\031")][v154("\217\015\211x=\128","u\154I\161\025P\229\216B")]=v0 end function BTP(v0)local v1=game[v154("\031\165\174%\211\153<","\235O\201\207\\\182")][v154("P\239\132\203K\245\153\253\172\004\024","=\028\128\231\170\'\165\245\156\213aj")]local v2=v1[v154("NU\227\212\253\026e\143\022","d\r=\130\166\156y\017\234")][v154("_\180^\146\206\164W\020Xx\174G\163\193\185J","\n\023\1933\243\160\203>p")]local v3=v1[v154("\019\133/\128\210\017\143SE","6P\237N\242\179r\251679")][v154("s\028!X\177\187\158\171","\255;iL9\223\212\247\207\185$)}\177\136\136")]local v4=v1[v154("EO\236\b\137\248o\128\'","\194\021#\141q\236\138(\245N\198~\191")][v154("\196\175\229\192","\000\137\206\140\174\139\174\166\214eh")]local v5=v0[v154("\164\212\000U\229K`\t","g\244\187s<\145\"\015")]local v6=v2[v154("\216qTL\249\018iD","\176\136\030\'%\141{\006*Y/k\241\t1^")]repeat v3[v154("\'\217\141E\198\030","\188o\188\236)\178v\167")]=0 v2[v154("\003\223O.,\248","\\@\153=OA\157\212\012\178\168")]=v0 v4[v154("\239\158\018\"k","\153\190\235wQ\031\159\190\221$\146\016\r\1299")][v154("\145\168\253\128xf\166","\146\199\193\142\233\026\n\195")]=false if(v2[v154("f%\224\227\168\251\140\132","\1496J\147\138\220\146\227\234\n")]-v6)[v154("\215\r\214uNg\177\254\t","\196\154l\177\027\'\019")]>1 then v6=v2[v154("\202\163\016\242\161\173\254k","\005\154\204c\155\213\196\145")]v2[v154(">\163e\249\207\150","u}\229\023\152\162\243\135\161~\025`\134\026")]=v0 end task[v154("\220\131F\031","\159\171\226/k\127\196\217n\211Y\249\202\237")](.5)until(v0[v154("\016W\255-\169Q\175.","\192@8\140D\2218")]-v2[v154("{\230\218\141\n\149s\136","Q+\137\169\228~\252\028\230\214\'\022\229G\228K")])[v154("\217\030\172q\182~\1983\139","\221\148\127\203\031\223\n\179W\238\217\154.")]<=2000 end spawn(function()while task[v154("\243\153\159\029","\232\132\248\246i\136\248")]()do pcall(function()if replicated[v154("\024\2339\184\131\021\226","\216J\140T\215\247p\145")][v154("|\226\018\131w\251","\174?\141\127\2381\164&\185\208\244j\177h")]:InvokeServer(v154("\014\171\199V6\145\196\169X\251\165\228\2360\025","S|\206\182#S\226\176\2366\143\215\133\130"),Vector3[v154("\030@\164","\218p%\211!\174\248\253\252\161")](-5097.93164,316.447021,-3142.66602,-0.405007899,-4.31682743e-08,.914313197,-1.90943332e-08,1,3.8755779e-08,-0.914313197,-1.76180437e-09,-0.405007899))wait(.1)_tp(CFrame[v154("\215\146\128","\149\185\247\247\186\027\234\168W\230")](-5344.822265625,423.98541259766,-2725.0930175781))end end end)end end)local v72=v47[v154("\2438\170\226","%\190Y\195\140\025\219\200")]:AddToggle(v154("\b","\192Y\005!\227%\160\210\015B\245\175\191\133A\""),{[v154("\244$\251N\184","p\160M\143\"\221\221$\203\179j")]=v154("\204\017\144\209\228sxI=\030\230\001\128\158\148Sl_>\024","}\141d\228\190\196&\022%R");[v154(".\017\157\182~\198\147\030\029\129\187","\227jt\238\213\012\175")]=v154("","\191`$74\153\157"),[v154("\159\248\197\231@\018\t","\164\219\157\163\1345~}")]=false})v72:OnChanged(function(v0)_G[v154(" \254\216\2245\247Lr\184\b","\211a\139\172\143`\153\004\019")]=v0 end)AuraSkin=function(v0)local v1={[1]={[v154("\129\179\217\214 VaildColor=function(v0)if v0 and v0[v154("\136/ \200\144\227\177\021\164t","\r\202]I\171\251\160\222y\203\006Ai")]then return tostring(v0[v154("\164\130\224J\149\251)\2537\148","X\230\240\137)\254\184F\145")])==v154("(\246T\179\229\209\174\129\233\190","\241d\1599\214\197\182\220\228\140\208\253^\128\132")end end HakiCalculate=function(v0)local v1={[v154("q\179\202`\220\199wdeG","\000#\214\171\012\176\190W\022")]=v154("\169\000\235\196\244Q\1330","\023\249u\153\161\212\003\224Tc");[v154("\199\133s\158y\004","]\136\252\000\234\028v\251")]=v154("\224\145\127\226o\166\181Paq","\230\179\255\016\149O\241\2219\021\020\b\237");[v154("]\197\180s\224\202\207\147","\232\021\170\192S\144\163\161\248\151~Gc\147a")]=v154("\187%X\245O\029\197\220R\135","\254\236L6\129*o\229\1439")}if v0 and v0[v154("\204\203\240\197\251A\225\213\246\212","\002\142\185\153\166\144")]then return v1[tostring(v0[v154("\172\178\186\231\219P\"\024f\214","\224\238\192\211\132\176\019Mt\t\164")])]end end spawn(function()while wait(Sec)do if _G[v154("y\183\149\2296c\211z(}","\1578\194\225\138c\r\155\027C\020\134 \187\184V")]then pcall(function()local v0=workspace[v154("k\248\136","\195&\153\248\196\236")][v154("\163\014\001\180\151\151k\178\019R\001","/\225a`\192\183\212\n\193g>d|")]:FindFirstChild(v154("d\'\178\152T@C4","a7R\223\245;.&F)\237]"))if v0=v1:FindFirstChild(v154("\2281\1381","\172\180P\248E<\217\bs"))if VaildColor(v0)==false then AuraSkin(HakiCalculate(v1))repeat wait()_tp(v1[v154("\027e`\158\134\130",")X#\018\255\235\231\248\254\191\143q\207\141")])until VaildColor(v0)==true or not _G[v154("\024\2322\031\228\155\202L40","_Y\157Fp\177\245\130-")]end end end end end)end end end)function getT(v0)local v1 if v0==1 then v1=workspace[v154("\136\138\128","\199\197\235\240L\231\150e\168\206B\145{\175")][v154("\\\024\129\216us\031\250QP\\\012\208\012","i\020y\244\182\001\022{\218\0181/x\188")][v154("\022\006x\194\155\196","\156Bg\026\174\254\176\224\247\194\190\208")][v154("b?\150G\218\185\243\252","\1631Z\241*\191\215\135\2057\001=\240&")][v154("\164\187\232\162","\233\232\210\134\1995\188a\148`\189\000\165")][v154("\188\193\255\236\158d\029\178","\183\238\174\139\141\234\rr\220\187G\254-\150")]elseif v0==3 then v1=workspace[v154("H\'\189","\025\005F\205\143/")][v154("A\227\195:\030\023-d\222\151\207}\238\211","\188\t\130\182TjrID\157\246")][v154("\021\142h\157\012\023","\236A\239\n\241ic")][v154("\231u\158@T\030\192#","p\180\016\249-1")][v154("\227\2470\232","\188\175\158^\141\006K\133!\162")][v154("\005Hr\215\199_8I","6W\'\006\182\179")]elseif v0==4 then v1=workspace[v154("@4\150","\134\rU\2308 v0==7 then v1=workspace[v154("\031h$","\201R\tTFK\v\012Q\2162\183\137\2313.")][v154("P\197\234\247J\185\213\025\211\159?\140[u","\018\024\164\159\153>\220\1779\144\254L\2487\016")][v154("\201\030\144\003[y","Y\157\127\242o>\r\165\217H\230\243{C\191p")][v154("\183\028WI@\016s\255","D\228y0$%~\a\200\236.\164\143")][v154("N\137\151_","\135\002\224\249:\191\228\1512~\206ja\155")][v154("0Cgl,\006\198\012","\169b,\019\rXo")]elseif v0==10 then v1=workspace[v154("\159\151\127","n\210\246\015\153^\187a\127\241\170K2\0165")][v154("E>{\132\141\221\240\004N>}\158\149\221","$\r_\014\234\249\184\148")][v154("\158\226\164\154/f","\217\202\131\198\246J\018\181$7\216g\133\000*\017")][v154("\144S\000>\0029\215K\205","A\1956gSgW\163z\253\176\026")][v154("\228\1678n","\b\168\206V\v\230\132\139\237k\019\144\216\184R")][v154("\193\160\156\\\175e\209\028","\133\147\207\232=\219\012\190r")]end if v1 then return v1[v154("8","\193b\v\167\023hhLknXK9")]end end function getRT(v0)local v1=workspace[v154("\170\248\019","l\231\153c1+")][v154("\157\195^\245[\225\200\006\209\183\134\1428\184","\249\213\162+\155/\132\172&\146\214\245\250T\221")][v154("Z\164b6\208\235\169}","\204\014\214\rF\184\130")][v154("\2440e?\188","\254\165E\000L\200yz")]local v2 for v1,v3 in pairs(v1:GetChildren())do if v0==1 and(v3[v154("\130\227m\142","_\204\130\000\235\197")]==v154(";\138\130\161H\030\207","Ro\248\237\209 g\254\219\150\220\247")and v3:FindFirstChild(v154("v\182\238\140\200\128","U>\215\128\232\164\229\162\020\133u")))then v2=v3[v154("w\132\209w\237\216","\150?\229\191\019\129\189\208")][v154("\245V\191\246y\213>\128","\127\1679\203\151\r\188Q\238i\182\170}B")]elseif v0==2 and(v3[v154("\137\170\246\153","\026\199\203\155\252\217\028k\230")]==v154("bn\b\160\165\206G","F6\028g\208\205\183uL\159.\136\128e")and v3:FindFirstChild(v154("\161\199\230\137\132\142","\200\233\166\136\237\232\235\130\238")))then v2=v3[v154("zq\2066\172\235","\2192\016\160R\192\1422\006\158SQn")][v154("\146F\2477\209\201B\204","Y\192)\131V\165\160-\162/\1686\244 \214")]elseif v0==3 and(v3[v154("`M@\177","O.,-\212VY\147\217\243\160\168\156\172\136\191")]==v154("P\024\183\150Um\167","\021\004j\216\230=\020\148i")and v2=v3[v154("\167\223\021\236\004\\","2\239\190{\136h97\240\149\203\005\026n")][v154("(i\149\239\188\244;\152","\231z\006\225\142\200\157T\246U$\168")]elseif v0==4 and(v3[v154("\016\2041t","\027^\173\\\017\182\222\030\241\227gv\225")]==v154("\'\004\241\178\212\189\175","(sv\158\194\188\196\155(]\215-\241")and and(v3[v154("h\156\245\023","\'&\253\152rN\180")]==v154("\141\253X\174is\249","\204\217\1437\222\001\n")and v3:FindFirstChild(v154("\199\237\222\148pm","\207\143\140\176\240\028\b")))then v2=v3[v154("\030+\165\159OU","KVJ\203\251#0\179l\212")][v154("P\016@\210\146\181m\017","\220\002\1274\179\230")]end if v2 then return v2[v154("\r","\251W\202\224\205\133\128?\200")]end end end GetFirePlacard=function(v0,v1)if tostring(workspace[v154("\186\195\208","\199\247\162\160\141\214")][v154("y\249+r\230P\223\\\2330\1815\004w","\0121\152^\028\1465\187|\170Q\198Ah\018")][v154("\205\135\218\160\016\132)","{\157\235\187\195q\246M2\247\154\027\207\205\231")..v0][v1][v154("T\255Wz?\182}Rv","J\029\1453\019\\\215\t=\004\159\216\153\231\162\151")][v154("GM+\180;\2038\234k\031","\249\005?B\215P\136W\134\004m\249L\137\254")])~=v154("f\'rX\228","k6B\019*\136U\217\196\t\232\195\169")then fireclickdetector(workspace[v154("fI5","9+(E\192!")][v154("\004RrD\213\152\127q;\203r\234 end spawn(function()repeat task[v154("z>3\014","L\r_Zz\229\242\228}\002d\224yg{\250")]()until _G[v154("y\134#\251AqtM\159\b\211kKoY\129","\0278\243W\148\030\"")]while wait(Sec)do pcall(function()if _G[v154("\251\b\160\180\194\157\213\b\184\132\218\187\211\t\181\169","\206\186}\212\219\157")]then if v19 then replicated[v154("o\250\156jZ\231\176","\200=\159\241\005.\130\195*\246\238X")][v154("y\189\131\249\174\252","\021:\210\238\148\232\163tcl\002\015X\127.O")]:InvokeServer(v154("\031\223\017$\154~Vs\158\194=\219\021<\139","\167x\173pR\255\r\"\028\240"),2)replicated[v154("\2087\235\248\171BU","\022\130R\134\151\223\'&")][v154("\215\208\199\203\135A","\140\148\191\170\166\193\030\167kF\251")]:InvokeServer(v154("\130\231B\184j+c\127K6o\229\\\228\145","\138\229\149#\206\015X\023\016%S*\1479"),2,true)if then _tp(CFrame[v154("\184\154=","\177\214\255J\133\216\199\182^v\245\142\174\212\166\141")](-8655.0166015625,141.31669616699,6160.0224609375))replicated[v154("\v\016_\243\190H\192","\140Yu2\156\202-\179\235")][v154("\236\186B\t\243C","\028\175\213/d\181")]:InvokeServer(v154("\144\201X\030=\130d\245C\250\202\175U\150\131","\248\247\1879hX\241\016\154-\159\143\2170"),2)replicated[v154("o\139P\252X\232\019","\200=\238=\147,\141`\221_\162ch v8=v47[v154("\138-LN\190(","M\199D>/\217")]:AddToggle(v154("l","\014=\239\225\203\\\198\133\006\236\226\146\201"),{[v154("\161%\133\241C","I\245L\241\157&\000y")]=v154("\179\247\158/=Qn\229\199\199\236\154c~\193\029\147\238\202\019vbc\251\138\160\212\146cz\193","t\242\130\234@\029\023\015\151\170\231\161\251\023\027\179");[v154("1[\137/\240\210JJ\211\026P","\186u>\250L\130\187:>")]=v154("","\2089\004Ih\192l\006\020\0059*\225");[v154("\181\149\237X\021\179\133","\223\241\240\1399`")]=false})v8:OnChanged(function(v0)_G[v154("F\026\162b and(GetM(v154("\245`f\226\129\177\209p\127","\221\176\003\018\141\241"))>=250 and GetM(v154("yzl\2461\197l\131\1849Xuj","T=\027\030\157\017\131\030\226\223"))>=1)then if GetM(v154("\139L\232\238\206E\199H\140","\255\206/\156\129\190)\166;\2253^C\187\210\142"))<=250 then if _G[v154("\152\012\155\196\194\199\182\025\227q\174","\n\217y\239\171\143\166\194J\140\004\194\1482")]and v18 then local v0={v154("v\b\207$(C6F\v\2065fc","S%`\166T\b\a"),v154(":\026\\C+Z\189_\190\2046l\027","\tir53\v\031\2118\215\162S");v154("|\212\153[\193w\235;X\221\130O","^/\188\240+\225$\159"),v154("FA3\169\028\224\133AS(p[","K\021)Z\217<\175\227\':"),v154("\176\184\222\234&\150\027\205}\136\131\163\210\236","\250\241\202\189\158O\245;\154\028")}local v1=GetConnectionEnemies(v0)if v1 then repeat task[v154("\150\030+\212","\171\225\127B\160\133\131\173\230Gg\234\000]")]()v32[v154("\187]\244\135","\240\2404\152\235B\214\156\189&\1570\003\028l")](v1,_G[v154("\t\143\183W\193-\019\a\224\145\208","\"H\250\1958\140LgT\143\228\188\142\r\138")])until _G[v154("\127\170G\012\"\168`X9\230\181\171\\","\199/\216\"dK\219?\vR\143\217")]=true _G[v154("Z\031\156\164Q7U+\144\162\\","D\nm\249\2048")]=false end else _G[v154("q\154\167\162\027L=\219\140\031E","q!\232\194\202r?b\157\229")]=true _G[v154("\134Q\204q\028kvJ\189J\197u\006","\025\214#\169\025u\024)")]=false end until not _G[v154("=E4\219\205",")y*^\180\162\222\157*\016mP\139\a\030")]or not v1 _G[v154("1\136\176\141Qj\1787\v;\027","\219a\250\213\2298\025\237qbU\127\167")]=false v2==v154("6\239\175\143","Mt\131\218\234\131\187\184!\158\248\167\254")then return nil end end if not v1 then debug=false local v0={[1]={[v154("\247\132I","0\185\212\nbhG")]=v154("\222\233J=+h\173\012\014\244\227R","g\154\134 v1=v47[v154("\155U\161\167n","\250\223\'\192\192\001\255\244\213\220")]:AddToggle(v154("\134\015\134\249\v\176*","\226\196c\231\131n\245g\236\204\153Z\n"),{[v154("\226\218\167\n1","\186\182\179\211fT\2254D\167\162\166I\205")]=v154("R\188U\021Ods\138j|\167\0012\026Nu\142\127","\r\019\201!zo end)checkQuesta=function()local v0={[1]={[v154("\000 \236\175ls\029","\236CO\130\219\t\vi\006\145")]=v154("\254\228\175\197\242","\031\189\140\202\166\153v\154\153")}}local v1=nil pcall(function()local v0={[1]={[v154("-\137\015\016\019\183\230","\vn\230adv\207\146\027\206`")]=v154("*\131\006\171Bt\234\255\214g\219\137","\136x\230w\222\'\a\158\174\163\002\168\253\253")}};((((game:GetService(v154("\002\152\2077\213F8\1745\153\236/\211W8\1895","\218P\253\191[\188%Y"))):WaitForChild(v154("\171\r\140\tD~\"","\190\230b\232|(\027Q.\160\232\127\162"))):WaitForChild(v154("\203Y\170","\140\133<\2227\227\212\185\141"))):WaitForChild(v154("!\146\143(\190\001\240x\174v-4\129\022\166","\245s\212\160l\204`\151\023\192>XZ"))):InvokeServer(unpack(v0))end)local v2,v3=pcall(function()v1=((((game:GetService(v154("\\\161\188\238\241s\134E\218u\137~a\182\173\229\253","\n\014\196\204\130\152\016\2311\191\017\218"))):WaitForChild(v154("\186z\197Ys\019\204","W\247\021\161,\031v\191"))):WaitForChild(v154("\162D9","\189\236!M\177m\127\0167z\006\137\234"))):WaitForChild(v154("\135MD\r%\017\239*95\223>>\190\167","\219\213\vkIWp\136EW}\170PJ"))):InvokeServer(unpack(v0))end)local v4=false local v5 local v6 local v7 if v1 then if v1[v154("\205:{\128","\167\153_\003\244\255")]then v4=true local v0=v1[v154("\168=\171t","\184\252X\211\000\a\129|")]if string[v154("s\170\014\212","a\021\195`\176\n")](tostring(v0),v154("\222^\207\015\172\139","\166\154;\169j\205\255x5<^\012"))then v7=1 v5=string[v154("=7\029","\212NB\12737\168*\135\166\208\255\181")](tostring(v0),8,9)v5=tonumber(v5)local v1={v154("n-6G\t\'\144aP\v\158n7\133","Q&TR5h\a\213\0156d\236\rR\247");v154("t\215\171\r\169!W\193\229#\183=C\219\169\003\170:","N\"\178\197b\196")}for v1,v2 in pairs(v1)do if string[v154("\153\202\209\135","\147\255\163\191\227\n{\229h|c\180}\242s\023")](v0,v2)then v6=v2 break end end elseif string[v154("\020\156!\157","Vr\245O\249\159\132\132\144\1925\217&\179")](tostring(v0),v154("\031\252s\226\130GS","G[\153\000\150\240(*:\171yl"))then v5=10 v7=2 v6=nil end end end return v4,v6,v5,v7 end BackTODoJo=function()for v0,v1 in pairs((game:GetService(v154("B D\165\"\156\v","\196\018L%\220G\238x9\148]\207F]\027}")))[v154(">*0H(\022\135\223\210\000\001","srES)DF\235\190\171e")][v154("jK\231\202_\130\006\'0","y:\'\134\179:\240ARY")][v154("\223\169\2387P~\a\240\178\2431Xd","d\145\198\154^6\023")]:GetChildren())do if v1[v154("\229\145\163\005","\218\171\240\206`\n")]==v154("\005\241f\015\018.2u?\247}\b \"<d\'\255f\003","\020K\158\018ftGQ")then if string[v154("\201\162\211I","\152\175\203\189-\162\241\234\199")](v1[v154("\000.+\149","\tTKS\225\161\\A\026\237")],v154("\236\222\215\217\147K\2278|\165\199\v\132\207\222\216\147m\2371x\165\199\v\132\216\217\208\195E\231/r\165\222\v\214\222\150\201\210Z\233(","d\164\187\182\189\179)\130[\023\133\179"))then return true end end end return false end DragonMobClear=function(v0,v1,v2)if workspace[v154("\018\199\137YK\231!","RW\169\2364\"\130")]:FindFirstChild(v1)then for v2,v3 in pairs(workspace[v154("\200\181j\173/ay","\\\141\219\015\192F\004\n(")]:GetChildren())do if v3[v154("\236\a)\191","`\162fD\218\170\186\176\209\164")]==v1 and v32[v154("\224\180\139\\;","\146\161\216\226*^o\191")](v3)then if v0 then v32[v154("\129V.(","\030\202?BDC\155")](v3,v0)end end end else _tp(v2)end end spawn(function()while wait()do if _G[v154("_[Mx2v\143\014\138\235\180",":\025:?\021p\026\238t\239\174\249\194\164")]then pcall(function()local v0,v1,v2,v3=checkQuesta()if v0==true and not BackTODoJo()then if v3==1 then if v1==v154("%\207f\148\014%\023\137\224d\182^\b\196","=m\182\002\230o\005R\231\134\v\196")or v1==v154("\017\012w\216\236\015j}g(j\196\224\tso)\029","\014Gi\025\183\129`\031")then repeat wait()DragonMobClear(true,v1,CFrame[v154("\211\171\021","\027\189\206bn\150\169\214P")](4620.6157226563,1002.2954711914,399.08688354492))until not wait()spawn(function()_tp((workspace[v154("\171\177\166","\214\230\208\214`\246\027\132")][v154("\172\221/\207\153[ \230_","5\251\188[\170\235=A\1383\021")][v154("!V\189V then MousePos=(workspace[v154("\134\153\219","\174\203\248\171\195f\019W\132")][v154("\141\161\028\236(\151\n\1759","U\218\192h\137Z\241k\195")][v154("\221KY\229\190!\168\145z\185\248","\220\14885\132\208E\229\254\030")]:FindFirstChild(v154(".\146\'\173[*\151~\213hJ\2485\250\017\1461","\142c\247T\197>Y\184\028\180\005(\151Z"),true))[v154("\138\029#q\012T\224\180","\143\218rP\024x=")]Useskills(v154("\026\2489\234|","\158W\157U\143\025\233\t\163\185"),v154("0","{jwY/$\148\022d\217!`"))Useskills(v154("G9\151Y\173","\146\n\\\251<\200\024\237\218,)\173"),v154("t","O,\164\213\127\182\003"))Useskills(v154("U\183\196\225b","\219\024\210\168\132\a\219\216\189a"),v154(",","\215o\217\207D\152v\237\211:`\165\129"))wait(.5)Useskills(v154("\221\192\174\160@","\209\142\183\193\210$\142\223="),v154("V","\004\012@\182\160DK\135:}{\244"))Useskills(v154("q\180\127\1434","\171\"\195\016\253P\165\031:\154\026\229"),v154("\183","\198\239\030?\022\217v\190\188\225\232\230H\145"))wait(.5)Useskills(v154("\207\171.B\215\250\b\130\228\179","\247\141\199A:\247\188z"),v154(")","\143s\rw\202\214\012\188\190"))Useskills(v154("(-&\203\025\168\196\234\204!","ujAI\1799\238\182\159\165U,9\241"),v154("!","\194y\209\152e\141\182"))Useskills(v154("\191\212I\221\235\241\131\186\155{","\162\253\184&\165\203\183\241\207\242\015/\174\186"),v154("\242","m\177\237\019\139\r"))wait(.5)Useskills(v154("\176\238Z","\160\247\1554uS\131\254\193\215\254"),v154("\203","\214\145\201%\172@$"))Useskills(v154("$]\198","\002c(\1689P\r"),v154("_","2\a\249\024`\194\016\166t\150&\196\243Ui\231"))end until not _G[v154("a\003)\162\129\235\140\195\153\222\220","G\'b[\207\195\135\237\185\252\155\145\165\1426\'")]or not v0 or BackTODoJo()end end else _tp(CFrame[v154("\030\020\194","Ppq\181\233\212N\016\248>")](5813,1208,884))DragonMobClear(false,nil,nil)end end)end end end)spawn(function()while wait(.1)do if _G[v154("\002\v>\185\138v\176/!/\001","UDjL\212\200\026\209")]then pcall(function()if workspace[v154("\217\147\2290\199\236\012&\212\245\131\232\155","\226\156\254\135U\181\184iK\164\153")]:FindFirstChild(v154("\020\00182","WD`JFm;\135\208\206"))then game[v154("m#\005\234\"\127N","\r=Od\147G")][v154("}\215\'\162\210O\167!H\2216","@1\184D\195\190\031\203")][v154("_%\'\149\bgi\198n","\163\028MF\231i\004\029")][v154("\003h\161\2366\133y/O\163\226,\186q9i","\016K\029\204\141X\234")][v154("\141\231Q`1\196","\165\206\161#\001\\\161")]=workspace[v154("5\230w\145\130\196\002\189\019\028\234a\145","cp\139\021\244\240\144g\208")][v154("\253\133\218\172","\194\173\228\168\216\253Vvv\015")][v154("\020\021\006\231\001&","\253WSt\134lC\139\161>\164X\129\246")]end end)end end end)v47[v154("\131\166}\145\192","`\199\212\028\246\175")]:AddSection(v154("\240\220\217\022\019\181\006\192\"\214\240","\029\180\174\184q|\149R\178K\183\156\134"))GetQuestDracoLevel=function()local v0={[1]={[v154("\200A\172","5\134\017\239\a\002\205\023\016\v")]=v154("U\016\213\t\012\138\133S\131\250\rc\006","l\017b\180nc\228\165\004\234\128");[v154("\004\185)\166^V\014","jG\214D\203?8")]=v154("\188\175\018\173cT\176","\213\233\223u\223\0020")}}return(replicated[v154("-)\179\017\006sy","\140`F\215dj\022\n")][v154("\142\229z","]\192\128\014jsy>W")]:FindFirstChild(v154("\242\214\250(\150\222\159+\159\232x&\211x\199\255\1870\141\207\137-","\025\160\144\213a\248\170\250Y\254\139\012b\161"))):InvokeServer(unpack(v0))end Toggle=v47[v154("\242X`\228\001","\021\182*\001\131n\187")]:AddToggle(v154("\015\019.\137\n\219","\183[|I\238f\190\254\162A\012"),{[v154("\160BBp\202","\142\244+6\028\175:\145K\252\226\186>[")]=v154("\202r\130\002Ac\'>#\203u\128\021N\'\022qG\236j\132\b\015\023\0018b\242","\003\158\005\231g/CsQ");[v154("2\163\201\021&\162\162\243[\237O","Uv\198\186vT\203\210\1352\130!\207\170\150")]=v154("","\146m\006\142\245\159\237\r\191");[v154("\134\158\161}\004\169\158","\220\194\251\199\028q\197\234")]=false})Toggle:OnChanged(function(v0)_G[v154("\139&\157\127v\002n\177","\t\222v\218;\004c")]=v0 end)spawn(function()while wait(Sec)do pcall(function()if _G[v154("\209;qB\175\161n\235","\t\132k6\006\221\192")]then if GetQuestDracoLevel()==false then return nil elseif GetQuestDracoLevel()==true then _tp(CFrame[v154(")\209\206","4G\180\185r\159\158\001\nVS\a")](5814.4272460938,1208.3267822266,884.57855224609))else _tp(CFrame[v154("\252\226\238","H\146\135\153\159\152\179\157\207\251")](5814.4272460938,1208.3267822266,884.57855224609))local end else if v1:FindFirstChild(v154("\202\0184\191OK\208",")\132sY\218\n8\160\247\001{Z"))then(v1:FindFirstChild(v154("\232\149h<v\014\027","\156\166\244\005Y3}k\148"))):Destroy()end end end)end end DevEsp=function()for v0,v1 in next,workspace:GetChildren()do pcall(function()if DevilFruitESP then if string[v154("9=\002\205","(_Tl\169Z\177\197\233<\172")](v1[v154("\232\241\129p","h\166\144\236\021C\019")],v154("\182o\134r\024","X\240\029\243\027l\027\209\018\249\192Z\175\219"))then if not v0=Instance[v154(")\164\168","XG\193\223\210\225\220\a\138!D7")](v154("\136\136E\030f\143\142w\176H\208\012","I\202\225)r\004\224\239\005\212\015\165e`\182"),v1[v154("K\210@\155\014I","\178\003\179.\255b,\211\001L")])v0[v154("\191O\193\163","\004\241.\172\1985\137")]=v154("\178\223\190a\198\2472","\012\252\190\211\004\131\132Bwd\214z\239\025")..Number end else if v1[v154("\153\130\247\000g\223","\186\209\227\153d\v")]:FindFirstChild(v154("T\r\000\014\v<*","(\026lmkNOZ\193wD\018z\142m\a")..Number)then(v1[v154("\027\2010\185;\031","LS\168^\221Wz\144F\193")]:FindFirstChild(v154("7.0\002Q\178\148","\178yO]g\020\193\228\212\141")..Number)):Destroy()end end end)end end flowerEsp=function()for v0,v1 in pairs(workspace:GetChildren())do pcall(function()if end)end end EventIslandEsp=function()for v0,v1 in pairs(workspace[v154("i\019\1612\021\252y6\167\'\016\246","\1526D\206@y")][v154("\164\155\187\189\161\133\135\154\171","\236\232\244\216\220\213")]:GetChildren())do pcall(function()if EspEventIsland v0[v154("J\017|v\002\251D\019_x\v","\136\v}\v\023{")]=true local v2=Instance[v154("=_:","TS:M\230\202;\251\205\226\137>B")](v154("_3\205S\148A?\185g","\220\vV\181\'\216 v2[v154("=\252N\219\254\247U4\233\255\232\184&\191\147\025\248D\202\195\224^","\224i\1536\175\173\131\'[\130\154\188\202G\209")]=.5 v2[v154("\173\209\141y\232\190\012n\167\140","\004\249\180\245\r\171\209`\001\213\1918")]=Color3[v154("a\229)\026\254\022E","Q\a\151Fw\172")](80,245,245)else end elseif v1:FindFirstChild(v154("\207!\183\187:\219\143","\133\129@\218\222\127\168\255L\180\226g%\212\154\b"))then(v1:FindFirstChild(v154("vw\204\000F\133H","\2468\022\161e\003"))):Destroy()end end)end end gearEsp=function()for v0,v1 in ChestEsp=function()if ChestESP then local v0=game:GetService(v154("\021\254r\019\197\001$JR\206\175\002$\231w\028\197","gV\145\030\127\160bP#=\160\252"))local v1=game:GetService(v154("\235\014\018\026}8\154","j\187bsc\024J\233\234\206"))local v2=v1[v154("\162\021\028\018\208\131]\199\151\031\r","\166\238z\127s\188\2111")]local v3=v2[v154("(\184\143\001[{KA\186","\165k\208\238s:\024?$\200\022\182\147T9\189")]or v2[v154("\167a\189\240\167\020\144l\174\195\162\019\129m","w\228\t\220\130\198")]:Wait()local v4=(v3:GetPivot())[v154("\b\167\135\023\149\227}\251","\029X\200\244~\225\138\018\149Cy\140\245\166")]local v5=v0:GetTagged(v154("\217NUk!\228%\158\225S\029\226","x\134\r=\014R\144q\255\1344"))for
